steps.title: Locate the two findings
steps.content: The text reports two findings: (1) white butterflies were observed on green flowers more than other butterflies were (a color–behavior link), and (2) butterflies fed more often on cloudy days (a weather–behavior link).

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Both color and weather were linked to behavior, so the complete answer must include both factors.

The other choices each ignore at least one of the two findings.

That matches Choice C — Both butterfly color and weather conditions.
